text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for Tracen Academy's annual summer
camp, and Sakura Chiyono O is fired up from day
one.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I swear I'm going to become Maruzen's
rival one day.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I may not be as strong as her yet. I may not have
what it takes to draw out her fighting spirit right
now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But if I give up on things because I assume they're
impossible, I'll never be able to accomplish
anything.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
In other words, "if you don't reach out your hand,
you can't turn on the faucet"! Let's do this,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my summer camp with Sakura Chiyono O
gets underway!
